violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the 3-bay sink was 10 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Food was observed held at 43-55 degrees Fahrenheit in refrigerator #1. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per owner, mozzarella cheese had been in the refrigerator since the day prior. Mozzarella cheese was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Per owner, all other food stored in the refrigerator was placed inside or made within the past 2 hours. All other foods were relocated to another refrigeration unit to cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Refrigerator #1 located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. The ambient air temperature was observed at 47 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Refrigerator #1 was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Refrigerator #1 must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Owner call repair service during time of inspection. Per owner, refrigerator #1 is scheduled to be fixed today. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects in ware washing area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (plates, peeler, containers) were observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings and food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The door to the outside, located in the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout establishment. The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects throughout establishment. The presence of roaches is not controlled as evidenced by live roaches in ware washing area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
Oil was observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the basement. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2021
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of rodent droppings. 1. Shelving (basement) 2. Equipment storage (kitchen) New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, unused equipment, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The floors throughout the establishment have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
